arts.ttl: Friedking Group Could Sign 'Rapid' Everton Star Who Wants to Leave for Roma
arts.sum: Roma could target Everton striker Beto this January, with Dan Friedkin's ownership of both clubs greasing the wheels of any potential move.

arts.ttl: Udinese and Roma separated by a point
arts.sum: Roma have won seven of their last nine matches against Udinese in Serie A (D1 L1), including each of the last four; the Friulians` only win against the Giallorossi in that period came back in September 2022 (4-0 at home). Roma are unbeaten in 10 of their last 12 away matches against Udinese in Serie A (W8 D2), after losing three of the previous four (W1).

arts.ttl: “We Must Digest This Defeat and Focus on Tomorrow’s Game”: Runjaic’s Rallying Cry for Udinese
arts.sum: Udinese's head coach Kosta Runjaic addressed the media ahead of the team's important Serie A match against Roma, scheduled to take place at the Bluenergy Stadium. Following a disappointing performance against Como, where Runjaic described the match as possibly "the worst of the year," he expressed his expectations for a strong reaction from his players.
